title: U2 UniData with Low-code AI: UOFast + VectorShift RAG Integration
summary: This Dev.to article presents a project that integrates legacy UniData (U2) systems with modern AI using the UOFast Python library and the VectorShift low-code Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) platform. UOFast extracts and flattens MultiValue data from UniData, which is then indexed in VectorShift to power a GPT-based chatbot capable of natural language queries over the legacy data. The solution demonstrates how to modernize MultiValue databases without disruption, enabling tasks such as record search, Q&A on business data, and report summarization. Future enhancements include real-time sync, program generation, and auto-API conversion. The work targets enterprise developers looking to bring legacy systems into AI-driven workflows.
